extortion.description: Parrish-McCall Constructors is a full-service commercial construction company based in Gainesville, Florida that provides services in General Contracting, Design-Build, and Construction Management. We specialize in K-12 education, healthcare, higher education, government, and commercial construction for both public and private clients. Formed in 1968 as M.M. Parrish Construction Company, Parrish-McCall continues to be a relationship based construction firm whose primary goal is to build lasting relationships with clients by delivering quality and value through an open, transparent process.
